title: Avaravar Vazhkaiyil Lyrics Pandavar Bhoomi
stanzas:
<div>
Avaravar Vazhkaiyil Lyrics Pandavar Bhoomi

Avar avar vaazhkaiyil
aayiram aayiram maatrangal
andha ninaivugal nenjinil
thirumbida thirumbida yaekkangal

adhu oru azhagiya
nila kaalam
kanavinil thinam thinam
ula pogum (2)

nilavugal sernthu
boomiyil vaazhthathe
adhu oru porkaalam

Avar avar vaazhkaiyil
aayiram aayiram maatrangal
andha ninaivugal nenjinil
thirumbida thirumbida yaekkangal

kaatrum kooda engaludan
iravinil thoonga idam kaetkum.
mazhai thuli kooda
en thaayin madiyinil
thavala thinam yaengum.

naththai koottin neer podhum
engalin thaagam
theerthu kolvom.

kaththum kadalum
kaikatta kavidhaigal
pole vazhnthu vandhom

thaayin madiyil
thinam irandhu
kaalaiyil meendum
uyir peruvom.

kanavinai kaalaiyil
mozhi peyarthu
solli solli sugamaai
thinam sirippom.

ayindhezhuthu pudhu mozhiyai
ariya vaiththaal en annai.
annan thangai ayyvarumae
nesam kondom tamil mannai

nilavugal sernthu
boomiyil vaazhthathe
adhu oru porkaalam
avar avar ...

annai oottiya pidi sottril
aayul muzhukka
pasi marandhom

otrai kannil adi pattaal
paththu kannil vali kandom

palli koodam thanthathillai
paasam ennum nool ondrai
vedhangal naangum
sonnadhillai engal kadhai
pol verondrai

kangalum neerthuli kandathillai
azhuthida avaigalum pazhagavillai
karuppaa sivappaa
theriyavillai kavalaigal
idhuvarai mulaithathillai

segarithu vaipatharkku
thaevai endru edhuvumillai
iravanukkum engalukkum
idaiveligal irundhadhillai

nilavugal sernthu
boomiyil vaazhthathe
adhu oru porkaalam

Avar avar vaazhkaiyil
aayiram aayiram maatrangal
andha ninaivugal nenjinil
thirumbida thirumbida yaekkangal

adhu oru azhagiya
nila kaalam
kanavinil thinam thinam
ula pogum (2)

nilavugal sernthu
boomiyil vaazhthathe
adhu oru porkaalam

seo.title: Avaravar Vazhkaiyil Lyrics Pandavar Bhoomi
seo.description: Full Avaravar Vazhkaiyil songs lyrics, Pandavar Bhoomi Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Snehan, Music: Bharadwaj, Singer(s): Bharadwaj.
seo.keywords: Snehan, Pandavar Bhoomi, Bharadwaj, Bharadwaj, Avaravar Vazhkaiyil full lyrics, Pandavar Bhoomi songs lyrics, Avaravar Vazhkaiyil lyrics snippets, Avaravar Vazhkaiyil WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Avaravar Vazhkaiyil lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song reflects on the various phases of life and the memories associated with them, evoking a sense of nostalgia.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Pandavar Bhoomi, this song captures the emotional journey of the characters, highlighting their struggles and memories.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Bharadwaj, who is also the music director, showcasing his talent in both areas.

When was the song released?

Avaravar Vazhkaiyil was released on September 21, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Avaravar Vazhkaiyil, the listener is taken on a reflective journey through the ups and downs of life. The song's melancholic tone and nostalgic lyrics evoke deep emotions, making it a poignant piece in the film Pandavar Bhoomi. It beautifully conveys the essence of memories and the passage of time, resonating with anyone who has experienced life's changes. Bharadwaj's soulful rendition adds to the song's emotional depth, making it a memorable experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Avaravar Vazhkaiyil from Pandavar Bhoomi is a beautifully crafted melody that resonates with the soul. Bharadwaj's soothing vocals combined with Snehan's poignant lyrics create a nostalgic atmosphere that lingers long after the song ends. This track is a perfect reflection of life's myriad emotions, making it a must-listen for any Tamil music lover.
stanzaMeanings: In everyone's life, there are countless changes, and those memories keep coming back to the heart.
It is a beautiful moonlit time that will slowly fade away in dreams.
The moons come together to live on this earth; it is a time of prosperity.
In everyone's life, there are countless changes, and those memories keep coming back to the heart.
The wind also seeks a place to rest in our hearts. Even the raindrops find a place in my mother's lap every day.
When the water from the river flows, it will quench our thirst.
We have come to live like poems of the sea and the shore.
In the lap of the mother, we will rise again in the morning.
In dreams, we will speak words and laugh happily every day.
If I keep a new language in my mother's heart, will my mother know? Brothers and sisters, we have all loved this Tamil land.
The moons come together to live on this earth; it is a time of prosperity.
In the mother's embrace, we have forgotten hunger for our entire lives.
When the eyes are struck, we see pain in ten eyes.
The school does not teach love; we have not told the stories of our lives.
We have not seen the tears in our eyes; they do not know how to cry, and they have not been washed away until now.
There is no need for anything to be prepared for the future; there have been no obstacles for him or for us.
The moons come together to live on this earth; it is a time of prosperity.
In everyone's life, there are countless changes, and those memories keep coming back to the heart.
It is a beautiful moonlit time that will slowly fade away in dreams.
The moons come together to live on this earth; it is a time of prosperity.
